title: Deck of Many Things
description: This mod adds the Deck of Many Things to your game.  Inspired by D&D.
body:
![Deck of Many Things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b53b5a0e9b9c5f313880ef3192e515a9ca921a4f.png)

## Description
This mod adds a Dungeons-&-Dragons-inspired Deck of Many Things to the game.

The deck has a 25% chance to be found in jungle temple chests. (Configurable)

Using the deck causes one of the 22 cards to be drawn at random.  Each card has a unique effect when drawn, ranging from gifting the player with resources to outright killing the player.

WARNING: Card effects may cause damage to your player or to your world!

In-game documentation is available via [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) if installed.

In-game configuration is available via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if installed.

For business inquiries, email dentedmodding@gmail.com. For issues, report on GitHub issues page.

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
